description: Cross-port conformance vectors for EideticLib.wordClass(_:) / gnomon_kit::word_class (FDC encoder Step 1, cookbook §2.1). 'path' is documentation only: 'table' = resolved by the static fast-path table (bit-identical across ports, the conformance contract per cookbook §8); 'tagger' = a token absent from the table, classified via the deterministic HMM on all platforms (HMM is the default; NLTagger is opt-in only); 'empty' = the empty-token short-circuit.
